sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports mild pain in the right foot, and his blood sugar has been running higher than normal. He denies pain in his foot.
medical_concepts: mild pain in the right foot

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient has an ulcer on his right foot. Examination reveals no other abnormalities.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has an ulcer on his right foot and is a diabetic.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start a statin. Follow up in 2 weeks to assess ulcer healing and blood sugar control.

medical_concepts: mild pain in the right foot
